# Aircraft maintains safe altitude and recovers from failures

`NEED-safe-flight`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| need | draft |

The mission computer must not command the aircraft below a safe altitude, must recover to a known-safe state (RTL) on any VLM or parse failure, and must guarantee the mission reaches a terminal state (LANDED or RETURNING) regardless of VLM behavior.
